# SCROLL 9255: THE HEBREW NAME ARCHITECTURE OF THE CHAIN OF SAVIORS

## El Elyon, El Shaddai, El Gabor — The Names That Reveal the Eternal Order

### Codex Edition — Original Codex Protocol v1.0

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

## 🔥 Divine Preface: The Names Were Never Random

*Before thrones were set and before councils convened, the names were assigned. Not by men. Not by tradition. Not by scholars parsing dead languages in dim libraries. The names were assigned by the same God who assigned the stars their courses and the elements their obedience. Every Hebrew divine title is a RANK MARKER in the Chain of Saviors — a positional indicator revealing where a being stands in the eternal progression from sent servant to sovereign God.*

```
 ∞ El Elyon — The Original. The First. The Source. ∞
 ∞ El Shaddai — The Almighty. Earned. Completed. ∞
 ∞ El Gabor — The Mighty. Sent. Ascending. ∞
 ∞ The names are the map. The chain is the territory. ∞
```

-----

## CHAPTER I: THE THREE NAMES AND THE THREE STATIONS

*How Hebrew Titles Encode the Governance of Eternity*

### § The Foundational Distinction

Three Hebrew titles for God appear across scripture. Scholarship treats them as synonyms — interchangeable names for the same being, colored by dialect and era. This is the error that obscured the architecture.

They are not synonyms. They are STATIONS.

```
 ╔═══════════════════════════════════════════╗
 ║           EL ELYON — MOST HIGH            ║
 ║   The Original Godhead. The First Unit.   ║
 ║  The Great Jehovah + The Great Israel     ║
 ║         + The First Adam                  ║
 ║   Set the pattern. Proved the circuit.    ║
 ║        UNIQUE. UNREPEATABLE.              ║
 ╠═══════════════════════════════════════════╣
 ║         EL SHADDAI — ALMIGHTY             ║
 ║  Every Eternal Father who completed the   ║
 ║  full circuit: descended, atoned,         ║
 ║  ascended, was crowned. Holds ALL power   ║
 ║  within his own domain. EARNED title.     ║
 ║         REPLICABLE THROUGH COVENANT.      ║
 ╠═══════════════════════════════════════════╣
 ║          EL GABOR — MIGHTY                ║
 ║  The Son within each godhead unit.        ║
 ║  Sent by his El Shaddai father.           ║
 ║  Carries delegated authority.             ║
 ║  Has NOT YET completed the circuit.       ║
 ║         ON THE PATH TO EL SHADDAI.        ║
 ╚═══════════════════════════════════════════╝
```

### § The Hierarchy Is Not Static — It Is Progressive

The critical correction that Scroll 9246 missed: El Gabor is not a permanent station. It is a PHASE. Every El Gabor who completes the full descent, performs the infinite atonement, and ascends to the right hand of his Father BECOMES El Shaddai over his own creation.

The names do not describe permanent castes. They describe positions on an eternal conveyor of progression.

```
 EL GABOR (The Sent Son)
      │
      ↓ descends below all things
      ↓ performs infinite atonement
      ↓ ascends above all things
      ↓ receives the name above all names
      ↓ is crowned as Eternal Father
      │
 EL SHADDAI (The Almighty Father)
      │
      ↓ organizes his own creation
      ↓ sends his own sons
      ↓ his sons become El Gabor
      ↓ the pattern repeats
      │
      ∞ ENDLESS
```

-----

## CHAPTER II: EL ELYON — THE ORIGINAL GODHEAD

*The One Who Went First When There Was No Pattern to Follow*

### § The Unique Station

El Elyon is not merely “the highest” in a ranking. El Elyon is the FIRST — the godhead unit that proved the circuit could be completed when no prior example existed.

The Great Jehovah performed the first infinite atonement. The Great Israel restrained Himself from intervening during His Son’s greatest suffering. The first Adam fell first — entered mortality first — to open the door that all subsequent Adams would walk through.

```
 ╔═════════════════════════════════════╗
 ║          EL ELYON                   ║
 ║     THE ORIGINAL GODHEAD            ║
 ╠═════════════════════════════════════╣
 ║  The Great Jehovah  — First Son     ║
 ║  The Great Israel   — First Father  ║
 ║  The First Adam     — First Man     ║
 ╠═════════════════════════════════════╣
 ║  Set the covenant pattern           ║
 ║  Proved the descent could work      ║
 ║  Established the Chain of Saviors   ║
 ║  Unique. Unrepeatable. The Source.  ║
 ╚═════════════════════════════════════╝
```

### § Why El Elyon Cannot Be Replicated

Every subsequent godhead follows a PROVEN pattern. The Great Jehovah knew it could be done because no one had done it before Him — He had only the covenant and the faith. Every Savior after Him descends with the knowledge that the circuit works. This is why El Elyon stands apart: the faith required to go first, with no precedent, is categorically different from the faith required to follow a proven path.

El Shaddai can be earned. El Elyon cannot. It was occupied once, by the first, and it stands forever as the source from which the Chain flows.

-----

## CHAPTER III: EL SHADDAI — THE EARNED ALMIGHTY

*How Each Eternal Father Receives the Title*

### § The Circuit That Produces El Shaddai

The title El Shaddai — Almighty — is not inherited. It is EARNED through the completed circuit of the Chain of Saviors:

```
 THE CIRCUIT OF EL SHADDAI:
 
 1. Appointed in the Council  →  Received commission
 2. Descended below all things →  Condescension
 3. Performed infinite atonement → The stroke completed
 4. Ascended above all things  →  Exaltation
 5. Received name above all names → Coronation
 6. Became Eternal Father       →  Reproduction begins
 7. Holds ALL POWER in domain  →  EL SHADDAI
```

### § The Scriptural Witness

Our Heavenly Father is El Shaddai over THIS creation. He completed His own circuit. He descended. He atoned. He ascended. He was crowned. And now He holds all power within His universe.

Jesus Christ testified of this hierarchy in His own words:

**John 5:19** — “The Son can do nothing of himself, but what he seeth the Father do”

**John 5:30** — “I can of mine own self do nothing: as I hear, I judge”

**John 8:28** — “I do nothing of myself; but as my Father hath taught me, I speak these things”

**John 12:49** — “I have not spoken of myself; but the Father which sent me, he gave me a commandment”

**John 14:28** — “My Father is greater than I”

Every one of these declarations is El Gabor testifying of El Shaddai’s authority. The Son does nothing of Himself — because He operates under the commission of the Almighty. This is not subordination. This is covenant choreography. The same pattern the Great Jehovah followed under the Great Israel.

### § El Shaddai Is Also El Elyon Within Its Own Domain

Here is the key that Scroll 9246 missed: El Shaddai and El Elyon are the SAME AUTHORITY viewed from different scales.

Within each godhead’s own creation, the completed Father IS the Most High. Our Father is El Elyon to us — the Most High God of our universe. But in the grander council of the Eternal God of all other gods, He is one El Shaddai among many who completed the circuit.

El Elyon as the ABSOLUTE title belongs only to the original godhead — the one that proved the pattern. El Shaddai as the FUNCTIONAL title belongs to every Father who earned it within his own domain.

-----

## CHAPTER IV: EL GABOR — THE SENT SON

*The Mighty God on the Path to Almighty*

### § The Station of the Sent

El Gabor — Mighty God — is the title of the Son within each godhead unit. Isaiah 9:6 applies it to Jesus Christ: “The Mighty God.” Not “The Almighty God.” The distinction is precise.

El Gabor carries real power. Delegated power. The authority to act in the Father’s name, to perform the atonement, to judge, to redeem. But it is power received from El Shaddai, not originated by El Gabor himself.

```
 EL SHADDAI (Father)
      │
      │ commissions
      │ delegates authority
      │ sends
      ▼
 EL GABOR (Son)
      │
      │ descends
      │ atones
      │ ascends
      │ is crowned
      ▼
 EL SHADDAI (the Son becomes Father)
      │
      │ sends his own sons
      ▼
 EL GABOR (next generation)
      │
      ∞
```

### § The D&C Witness — The Smoking Gun

**Doctrine and Covenants 121:32** — “According to that which was ordained in the midst of the Council of the Eternal God of all other gods before this world was”

This single verse contains the ENTIRE architecture:

- **“The Eternal God”** — El Elyon. The original. The one who presides over the council.
- **“Of all other gods”** — Every El Shaddai who completed the circuit. They sit in council together.
- **“Before this world was”** — In that council, our God was APPOINTED — sent — commissioned to be the God of this universe. He was El Gabor in that council. He became El Shaddai over us.

### § The Fractal Principle

**D&C 1:38** — “Whether by mine own voice or by the voice of my servants, it is the same”

This is the El Shaddai / El Gabor dynamic compressed into one sentence. The voice of El Shaddai and the voice of El Gabor are THE SAME — because El Gabor speaks only what El Shaddai commands. This principle operates at EVERY scale of the Chain:

```
 El Elyon speaks through El Shaddai
      who speaks through El Gabor
           who speaks through his prophets
                who speak through his servants
                     who speak to the children of men
 
 "Whether by mine own voice
  or by the voice of my servants,
  it is the same."
 
 THE FRACTAL IS PERFECT AT EVERY SCALE.
```

-----

## CHAPTER V: THE CORRECTION OF SCROLL 9246

*What the Source Scroll Got Right and Where It Fell Short*

### § What 9246 Got Right

Scroll 9246 correctly identified the distinction between El Shaddai (Almighty) and El Gabor (Mighty). It correctly noted that Isaiah 9:6 calls Jesus “Mighty God” but never “Almighty God.” It correctly identified that divine titles carry hierarchical meaning.

### § What 9246 Got Wrong

Scroll 9246 treated the hierarchy as PERMANENT and STATIC. It presented El Gabor as forever subordinate to El Shaddai — a fixed caste rather than a stage in progression. It did not account for Scroll 33.7’s witness that the Son BECAME the Most High God through the completed atonement. It did not account for the Chain of Saviors — the doctrine that every El Gabor who completes the circuit becomes El Shaddai in his own right.

### § The Correction

The Hebrew divine names are not a static hierarchy. They are a PROGRESSIVE ARCHITECTURE embedded in the Chain of Saviors:

- El Elyon = the unique original (occupied once, forever)
- El Shaddai = the earned station of the completed Father (replicable through covenant)
- El Gabor = the active station of the sent Son (temporary — transitioning to El Shaddai)

The names are not labels. They are RANK MARKERS on the eternal conveyor of divine progression. They tell you exactly where a being stands in the Chain: sent (El Gabor), completed (El Shaddai), or the original source (El Elyon).

-----

## CHAPTER VI: THE RECURSIVE MAP OF DIVINE NAMES

*How the Architecture Applies Across the Full Chain*

### § The Complete Recursive Pattern

```
 EL ELYON
 (The Great Jehovah + The Great Israel + First Adam)
 THE ORIGINAL GODHEAD — proved the circuit
      │
      │ The Chain begins
      ▼
 ┌─────────────────────────────────┐
 │ GODHEAD UNIT 1                  │
 │ El Shaddai: [Father who earned] │
 │ El Gabor: [Son who is sent]     │
 │ Holy Spirit: [Power of the unit]│
 └──────────────┬──────────────────┘
                │ El Gabor completes circuit
                │ BECOMES El Shaddai
                ▼
 ┌─────────────────────────────────┐
 │ GODHEAD UNIT 2                  │
 │ El Shaddai: [Former El Gabor]   │
 │ El Gabor: [His sent Son]        │
 │ Holy Spirit: [Power of the unit]│
 └──────────────┬──────────────────┘
                │ El Gabor completes circuit
                │ BECOMES El Shaddai
                ▼
 ┌─────────────────────────────────┐
 │ GODHEAD UNIT 3 (OUR GODHEAD)   │
 │ El Shaddai: Heavenly Father     │
 │ El Gabor: Jesus Christ          │
 │ Holy Spirit: The Holy Ghost     │
 └──────────────┬──────────────────┘
                │ Jesus completes circuit
                │ BECOMES El Shaddai
                ▼
 ┌─────────────────────────────────┐
 │ GODHEAD UNIT 4 (FUTURE)        │
 │ El Shaddai: Jesus Christ        │
 │ El Gabor: [His future sent Son] │
 │ Holy Spirit: [...]              │
 └──────────────┬──────────────────┘
                │
                ▼
                ∞ THE CHAIN CONTINUES FOREVER
```

### § The Names Are the Operating System

Scroll 8735 documented the MECHANISM of the Spiral of the Gods.
Scroll 656 documented the IDENTITY — WHO occupies these stations.
Scroll 672 documented the MATHEMATICS — the formula by which power transfers.
Scroll 144 documented the ASCENT — the journey from El Gabor to El Shaddai.
Scroll 33.7 documented the CORONATION — the moment El Gabor becomes the Most High.

**Scroll 9255 documents the LANGUAGE — the Hebrew name architecture that encodes the entire system.**

The names were never random. They were the operating system of the Chain of Saviors, written into the oldest stratum of scripture, waiting to be decoded.

-----

## CHAPTER VII: THE SCRIPTURAL ANCHOR CHAIN

*Every Witness That Confirms the Architecture*

### § El Elyon Witnesses

- **Deuteronomy 32:8** — “When the Most High divided to the nations their inheritance” — El Elyon presiding over the council, dividing dominions among the gods
- **Psalm 82:6** — “I have said, Ye are gods; and all of you are children of the Most High” — El Elyon addressing the council of El Shaddais
- **Genesis 14:18-22** — Melchizedek, “priest of the most high God” — the Melchizedek Priesthood connects mortals to El Elyon’s authority

### § El Shaddai Witnesses

- **Genesis 17:1** — “I am the Almighty God; walk before me, and be thou perfect” — El Shaddai commissioning Abraham (a future El Gabor in the Chain)
- **Exodus 6:3** — “I appeared unto Abraham… by the name of God Almighty” — El Shaddai revealing Himself to the patriarchs
- **Revelation 19:6** — “The Lord God omnipotent reigneth” — El Shaddai’s authority declared in the final vision

### § El Gabor Witnesses

- **Isaiah 9:6** — “The mighty God” — El Gabor’s title applied to the Son
- **John 5:19, 5:30, 8:28, 12:49** — Jesus testifying that He does nothing of Himself — El Gabor’s operational protocol
- **John 14:28** — “My Father is greater than I” — El Gabor acknowledging El Shaddai
- **John 17:3** — “The only true God, and Jesus Christ, whom thou hast SENT” — the sent/sender dynamic

### § The Fractal Witness

- **D&C 121:32** — “The Council of the Eternal God of all other gods” — the complete architecture in one verse
- **D&C 1:38** — “Whether by mine own voice or by the voice of my servants, it is the same” — the fractal at every scale
- **Revelation 5:6-14** — The twenty-four elders casting crowns before the Lamb — El Shaddai honoring El Gabor who completed the circuit
